mapper.insert: INSERT INTO restaurant_tbl (member_no, rest_name, rest_addr, lat, lng, category, phone, hours, rest_content, rest_thumb, created_at) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{restName}, #{restAddr}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{category}, #{phone}, #{hours}, #{restContent}, #{restThumb}, current_timestamp())
mapper.select:
SELECT r.rest_name, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.ai_review, r.rest_content, r.lat, r.lng, r.phone, r.hours, r.rating_sum, r.review_total_count, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rest_like_tbl rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rest_report_tbl rr WHERE rr.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rr.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_report
FROM restaurant_tbl r WHERE r.rest_no = #{restNo} AND r.rest_status = 'NORMAL'
SELECT t.name FROM restaurant_tags_tbl rt INNER JOIN tags_tbl t ON rt.tag_no = t.tag_no WHERE rt.rest_no = #{restNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_tbl r INNER JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE rest_no = #{restNo} ORDER BY r.visit_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_tbl (member_id, rest_no, review_content, rating, visit_date) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{restNo}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating}, #{reviewVisit})
mapper.select:
SELECT m.member_thumb, m.member_name, r.review_content, r.visit_date AS review_visit, r.rating
FROM review_tbl r INNER JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_no = m.member_no WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo};

SELECT c.comment_no, c.member_no, m.member_name AS writerName, m.member_thumb, c.content, c.created_at, c.depth, c.parent_comment
FROM review_comment_tbl c INNER JOIN member_tbl m ON c.member_no = m.member_no WHERE c.review_no = #{reviewNo} AND c.com_status = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_comment, c.comment_no), c.depth, c.comment_no

SELECT c.comment_no, c.member_no, m.member_name AS writerName, m.member_thumb, c.content, c.created_at, c.depth, c.parent_comment
FROM review_comment_tbl c INNER JOIN member_tbl m ON c.member_no = m.member_no WHERE c.comment_no = #{commentNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_comment_tbl (review_no, member_no, parent_comment, depth, content) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{req.memberNo}, #{req.parentComment}, #{req.depth}, #{req.content})
mapper.select:
SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rest_like_tbl rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like
FROM restaurant_tbl r
ORDER BY rating_avg DESC, r.review_total_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg, TRUE AS is_like
FROM restaurant_tbl r INNER JOIN rest_like_tbl rl ON r.rest_no = rl.rest_no WHERE rl.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rest_like_tbl rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like,
( 6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * COS(RADIANS(lat)) * COS(RADIANS(lng) - RADIANS(#{coords.lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(lat)) ) ) AS distance_km
FROM restaurant_tbl r
WHERE ( 6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * COS(RADIANS(r.lat)) * COS(RADIANS(r.lng) - RADIANS(#{coords.lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(r.lat)) ) ) <= 10

SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category,
ROUND( r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rest_like_tbl rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like
FROM restaurant_tbl r
r.rest_addr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.region}, '%')
AND r.category IN
#{category}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
ORDER BY rating_avg DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
ORDER BY r.review_total_count DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{req.size} OFFSET #{req.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM restaurant_tbl r
r.rest_addr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.region}, '%')
AND r.category IN
#{category}
